title: Creamy Tuscan Butter Pasta
excerpt: Sun-dried tomatoes, spinach, and a silky one-pan butter sauce.

steps.title: Cook pasta
steps.desc: Boil pasta in salted water until al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water before draining.

steps.title: Make sauce
steps.desc: Melt butter, fry garlic, add tomatoes, cream and Parmesan. Simmer 5 minutes.

steps.title: Combine
steps.desc: Add spinach and pasta to sauce. Toss with pasta water until silky.

tips: Reserve pasta water — it makes the sauce silky.
intro: A delicious, quick weeknight pasta that tastes like restaurant quality.good
